title: Plastic 32 Shot Glasses - Reusable, Durable, Bulk Party Set for Weddings, Events, and Gatherings
features: 32-Pack of Plastic Shot Glasses – Perfect for large gatherings, parties, and events with 32 durable shot glasses in one pack. Durable & Reusable – Made from high-quality, strong plastic that’s perfect for multiple uses, saving you money and reducing waste. Ideal for Any Occasion – Perfect for weddings, birthdays, BBQs, New Year’s Eve parties, or casual get-togethers. Great for shots, cocktails, mini desserts, and appetizers. Dishwasher Safe – Easy to clean and reuse, simply place them on the top rack of your dishwasher for hassle-free cleanup. Lightweight & Space-Saving – Stackable design makes them easy to store, transport, and carry to any event.
description: Make your next event unforgettable with the Kingfisher Plastic Shot Glasses! This 32-pack of durable, high-quality plastic shot glasses is the perfect solution for any occasion. Whether you're hosting a wedding, throwing a backyard barbecue, or celebrating New Year's Eve, these shot glasses are designed to withstand the fun and excitement of your party. Crafted from sturdy, reusable plastic, these shot glasses are both practical and affordable. They’re great for shots, small desserts, appetizers, or any other mini treats you want to serve. Their lightweight and unbreakable nature make them an ideal choice for large gatherings or outdoor events.
